content: Just as the high school English writing workshop framework teaches human learners to structure explicit reflection on their draft outputs to align writing with intended communication goals, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow this structured pedagogical template to turn unstructured self-critique into sequential, learnable reflection steps. This framing reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel AI engineering trick, but as a formalized version of the same guided reflective practice humans use to improve iterative work.
